prestazioni: FA20F (direct-injection, D-4S) engine fortified with a Tomei 2.2L stroker kit (86.0mm bore, 98.0mm stroke) paired with forged JE Pistons (9.0:1 compression) and Manley H-beam connecting rods for 300+ hp on E85 with a Garrett GTX3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, ball-bearing center housing) and custom 38mm external wastegate setup

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with individual cylinder fuel trims, flex-fuel sensor integration, and launch control mapped by Haltech-trained tuners, coupled with an AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor for closed-loop AFR targeting 11.8:1 under boost

Kazama Auto 4-2-1 unequal-length stainless header (1.75" primaries, 3" collector) feeding into a custom 3.5" titanium exhaust system with a Burns Stainless muffler core, paired with an HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve and a custom intercooler setup (GReddy Type-RS front-mount, 12.5" x 24" x 3.5" core) with Mishimoto silicone couplers
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (BRZ-specific, 30mm extended fenders, carbon fiber overfenders) with custom STI-inspired front splitter (25mm overhang, 3D-printed ABS with aluminum reinforcement) and a Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm span, 300mm chord, carbon fiber construction) mounted on STI-spec rear strut tower braces

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 20mm drop) with custom STI-spec pillowball top mounts and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) paired with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars (22mm diameter, 1.2mm wall thickness)

STI Performance-specific carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 30% weight reduction, functional NACA ducts) and rear diffuser (VERTEX, 3-piece design with integrated brake cooling ducts), finished with a custom STI-inspired livery (Subaru World Rally Team blue with gold accents, 3M 2080 vinyl wrap) and Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +35, 18x10.5 +40, 5x100 PCD, 18.5kg front/19.2kg rear)
